MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Lisa Cannon's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents and to compel appearance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Counsel for plaintiff shall meet and confer as to scheduling the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed within 45 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
